meaning: n.舰队,水兵,海运业adj.海的,海产的,航海的,船舶的,海运的
examples: Bezanik is diving to collect marine organisms.
Marine mammals generally swim with the current.
Marine life was discovered at depths previously thought to be azoic.
Dr Peter Richardson, of the Marine Conservation Society (MCS), said Wales' waters were currently "turtle heaven".
He came to America 45 years ago and enlisted in the US Marine Corps.
